description: The welcome screen presents profile, project, model, templates, and extra affordances before the first prompt, making the opening experience feel more like setup than immediate progress.
expected: A first-time user should be able to recognize the optional controls quickly and feel invited to type immediately.
actual: The main composer is visible, but the surrounding controls compete for attention and raise the cost of understanding the first step.
suggested_fix: Visually downgrade optional controls and make the composer/readiness state more dominant.
